overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit forest environment. The character travels along a dirt path past a ruined brick structure, continues through dense woodland, walks along a sandy riverbank, and returns to a forest trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with ruined brick structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a forest path, passing a ruined brick wall on the left side while carrying two swords on his back

entered.detail: Weathered red brick ruins partially covered by vegetation, approximately 3 meters tall
White-barked birch tree with green foliage
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass
Tall evergreen trees forming a dense forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path through a dense forest. A prominent ruined brick wall stands on the left side, partially overtaken by nature. Sunlight filters through the tree canopy, creating dappled lighting on the path ahead.

events.description: forest opens up revealing river water and sandy bank on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest thins and a river becomes visible ahead

entered.detail: Calm river with reflective surface visible through the trees ahead
Sandy shoreline leading down to the water's edge

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, the dense forest gives way to a more open area. The ruined brick structure falls behind as the path approaches a river. The ground transitions from dirt to sandy soil near the water's edge, with the forest canopy opening to reveal more sky.

events.description: character adjusts path to walk around a wooden cart near the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy riverbank, navigating around obstacles while surveying the shoreline

entered.detail: Abandoned wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting on the sand
Weathered wooden fence posts marking the edge of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the open sandy riverbank under full sky exposure. An abandoned wooden cart sits on the left side of the path. The water stretches to the right while the forest continues on the left. The character navigates around the cart and continues along the shore.

events.description: turning away from the river to re-enter the forest on a dirt path

agents.ego_description: turning inland away from the river and walking up a slope back into the forested area

entered.detail: Trees with white blossoms visible ahead on the path
Short wooden posts marking the trail boundary

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the river and heads back into the forest. The sandy shore gives way to a dirt path surrounded by dense vegetation and flowering trees. The river disappears from view as the forest canopy closes in overhead, returning to the enclosed woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that opens onto a sunlit riverbank before returning to the enclosed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path past a ruined brick wall, where dappled sunlight filters through a thick canopy of trees. As he progresses, the forest thins and the ground transitions from dirt to sandy soil, leading the camera toward the open expanse of a river. The scene then expands along the sandy shore, passing an abandoned wooden cart under full sky exposure with the water stretching to the right. Finally, the character turns away from the river and heads back into the forest, where the sandy terrain gives way to a dirt path surrounded by flowering trees as the canopy closes in overhead.
